batch_summary.note: Jul–Aug 2023: Olivia saw what she believed was Eli vaping on video call — reported to Melissa (RF-08 relay context). This is Olivia reporting to Melissa (surveillance role, RF-08 dimension) not adult-conflict disclosure to Olivia. No standalone RF-11 primary signal. Peripheral: behavioral note that Olivia is already in an intelligence-reporting role by Jul 2023.
